channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Peer pressure can make this clownfish change its stripes
item.description: Tomato clownfish, in response to an unpredictable world, appear capable of adjusting when they lose their stripes based on cues from other fish and th...

item.title: Hezbollah strikes Israel as American and Israeli planes pound Iran
item.description: Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and th...

item.title: Iran war widens, threatens to engulf Lebanon
item.description: The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as Lebanon's militant group Hezbollah responded to the killing of Iran's spiri...

item.title: Ivermectin is making a post-pandemic comeback, among cancer patients
item.description: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It ...

item.title: How long do electric vehicle batteries actually last?
item.description: When the modern electric vehicle was still in its infancy, drivers worried that vehicles would need expensive battery replacements within a few years....

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson returns home to South Carolina to lie in state
$1 Rental Properties and “Infinite” Returns with a 100% On-Market Strategy
item.description: This might be the smartest small real estate portfolio strategy we’ve ever heard. Today’s guest has done the seemingly impossible—gotten rental proper...

item.title: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
item.description: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

item.title: Investors spill what they aren’t looking for anymore in AI SaaS companies
item.description: TechCrunch spoke with VCs to learn what investors aren't looking for in AI SaaS startups anymore.

item.title: 3 US troops killed and 5 are seriously wounded during Iran attacks, military says
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been killed and five others seriously wounded during the attacks on Iran.

item.title: Let’s explore the best alternatives to Discord
item.description: With many users feeling uneasy about Discord's new age verification requirement, here are some alternatives that could be worth exploring.

item.title: Polymarket saw $529M traded on bets tied to bombing of Iran
item.description: Six newly-created accounts made a profit of $1 million by correctly betting that the U.S. would strike Iran by February 28.

item.title: FBI investigates Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act
OpenAI reveals more details about its agreement with the Pentagon
item.description: By CEO Sam Altman’s own admission, OpenAI’s deal with the Department of Defense was “definitely rushed,” and “the optics don’t look good.”

item.title: The Top Trending Rental Markets to Start 2026 Are Not What You’d Expect

item.title: How to Buy 4 Rental Properties by 40 Years Old
item.description: Four rental properties by age 40? It’s possible, and if you can achieve it, your financial future will change forever. Henry and I have done it—both o...

item.title: What Landlord Insurance Policies Don’t Cover When it Comes to Short-Term Rentals
item.description: This article is presented by Proper Insurance. As a real estate investor, you likely already know quite a bit about the importance of landlord insuran...
